TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED AND REQUESTED TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE.) TRIAL OF NOV-21-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SAMUEL WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT S.F. HOUSING AUTHORITY THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT'S JURISDICTION IS LIMITED TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES RELATED TO THE ALLEGED BREAK-IN AT HIS RESIDENCE. THIS JUDGMENT IS NOT A RULING ON PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR RELOCATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
